markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX pricing and understand its competitive differentiation.](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Pricing:** A $30k, 8-week strategy sprint (Phase 1) precedes a 12-month, $15k/mo minimum execution phase (Phase 2), delivering \~20 articles/month.](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [**Differentiation:** GrowthX focuses on scalable SEO/GEO content using a proprietary AI workflow. It contrasts with Graphite, which may be better for dev content, thought leadership, or social media.](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [**Decision Timeline:** Outtake will decide on a content partner before its Head of Marketing starts (target: Feb 1), driven by market pressure to begin building a content foundation now.](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)

## Topics

### Outtake's Context & Decision Timeline

  - [**Urgency:** Outtake needs to start content creation now due to market pressure, rather than waiting for a new marketing leader.](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [**Team Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
      - [**Current:** Abiola Familusi (Senior PMM) is leading the evaluation.](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
      - [**Future:** A Head of Marketing search is underway, with a target start date of Feb 1.](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [**Process:** Outtake is in a market discovery phase and will meet with competitor Graphite next week before making a decision.](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)

### Pricing & Engagement Model

  - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint**](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
      - [**Cost:** $30,000](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
      - [**Duration:** 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
      - [**Deliverables:** A content OS (strategy, roadmap, topic clusters) and initial articles.](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
      - [**Pace:** \>10 articles possible, contingent on a fast review process.](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Growth Execution**](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [**Cost:** $15,000/month minimum (flexible payment terms, e.g., quarterly)](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [**Duration:** 12-month term](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [**Deliverable:** \~20 articles/month (5/week)](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

### GrowthX's Differentiators & Workflow

  - [**Core Focus:** Scalable SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) content.](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [**Strategy:** An audience-first approach that connects every assignment to a keyword opportunity and competitor analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [**Proprietary AI Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [**Human Role:** Defines inputs and context via "artifacts" (e.g., ICP profiles, competitor analysis).](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [**AI Role:** Generates outlines, drafts, meta tags, and on-brand images.](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [**Editor Role:** Manually reviews and edits every draft for quality and brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [**Scope:** GrowthX publishes to Outtake's existing blog template but does not perform custom web development.](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Abiola Familusi (Outtake):**](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
      - [Meet with competitor Graphite next week.](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
      - [Reconnect with Tyler Pavlas by next Wednesday with a more informed opinion on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/dFGcnsxCoytSydan9GdNF5_K7xEsxyFy?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
